buildList.buildDescription: Winning one shell at a time

modules.moduleDescription: Dirty Substance: The Grease effect remains active for an additional 5s after and enemy leaves a Grease are. Dirty Substance Grease Area Duration +10s, Dirty Substance Grenade Count +4, Dirty Substance Grenade Range -10%
Zealous: -25% to reload time for 10s after a successful shot. The effect does not stack. Turret traverse speed +22%, Engine power -5%

Warded: Taking damage applies Warded. Delay between activations: 3.3s, Hit points +8%, Incoming Crit Modifier (Engine) -10%, Incoming Crit Modifier (Ammo Rack) -10%, Engine power -10%, Hull traverse -10%
Grants use of Thermal gunner sights. Spotting range +8%, Radar Update Interval -5%
Increased Mobility: +10% to engine power and +5% to hull traverse speed for 7s after an internal model is hit. Forward speed +6%, Engine power +15%, Hull traverse -5%

equipments.equipmentDescription: Instantly restores HP and shields. Restores 550 HP instantly. Triggers shield recovery on activation. Taking damage interrupts the repair process. Cooldown: 45s. Charges: 3. Charge cooldown: 15s.
Temporarily grants the vehicle extra HP that depletes over time. Grants 700 temporary HP on activation. After 1s, temporary HP starts to deplete at 25 HP/s. Cooldown: 105s

perks.perkDescription: Rising Tempo increases base reload time by 7.5% instead of 12.5%
+20% to reticle size, including while moving
Reduces minimum lock-on time for a Hydra strike from 1.5s to 1.2s and extends lock-on after stopping targeting from 2.5s to 3.5s
